name: Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening for 30 seconds.
2. Add the sugar and beat until well blended.
3. Add the molasses and beat again for a few seconds.
4. Stir in the dry ingredients and spices one at a time, ensuring they are well blended after each addition.
5. Gradually add flour, mixing thoroughly.
6. Roll out the dough to be as thin as possible (in several batches if needed).
7. Cut into shapes using cookie cutters and place on greased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 5 to 6 minutes at 375°F.
Makes 60 cookies.
